ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "aea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Area Education Agency (AEA) the school belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the school is located */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the school is located */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_code_school_code" TEXT /* District code and school code */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type (e.g., Elementary, Middle, High) */,
  "year_academic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school rank */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* School address */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* School city */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* School state */,
  "school_zip" TEXT /* School zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_aea_id FOREIGN KEY ("aea_id") REFERENCES aeas ("aea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aeas" (
  "aea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AEA */,
  "aea_name" TEXT /* Name of the AEA */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AEA */,
  "aeairector_name" TEXT /* Name of the AEA director */,
  "aea_address" TEXT /* AEA address */,
  "aea_city" TEXT /* AEA city */,
  "aea_state" TEXT /* AEA state */,
  "aea_zip" TEXT /* AEA zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the AEA record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the AEA record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* County population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "district_address" TEXT /* District address */,
  "district_city" TEXT /* District city */,
  "district_state" TEXT /* District state */,
  "district_zip" TEXT /* District zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., KG, 01, 02) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "academic_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2014-2015) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the academic year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank (e.g., Commendable, Exceptional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade the student is in */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "student_address" TEXT /* Student address */,
  "student_city" TEXT /* Student city */,
  "student_state" TEXT /* Student state */,
  "student_zip" TEXT /* Student zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the teacher works at */,
  "teacher_address" TEXT /* Teacher address */,
  "teacher_city" TEXT /* Teacher city */,
  "teacher_state" TEXT /* Teacher state */,
  "teacher_zip" TEXT /* Teacher zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the teacher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the teacher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that offers the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-course enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student-course record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student-course record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "student_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade is for */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student-grade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student-grade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget is for */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is for */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the policy is for */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_policies_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator, policymaker) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_versions" (
  "school_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school version */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the school record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the school record was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the school record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_versions_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
